text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've come to observe a race, and<n>what a race it is!
Running ahead of<n>the pack is a certain pair of
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Paaalmeeer! C'mon, bestie, let's<n>gooo! We gotta
show this crowd what<n>we're made of!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Bet! Let's do this, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios and Mejiro Palmer<n>banter as they
fight for first place with<n>grins on their faces. They
soon close<n>in on the final stretch, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha... I didn't even make it on the<n>scoreboard...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you did great out there! Don't<n>be sad. Sure
we got scooched off the<n>scoreboard, buuut...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's a great time for a selfie! Hang on,<n>I'll be right
back with my phone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hmm... I'm not really feeling it right<n>now.
Gimme a sec to get my face<n>ready!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! What's up? Your<n>face is
always on point!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: C'mon, this is the moment! You'rethe moment!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know you're still shook from the<n>race results,
and honestly, mood. That<n>was a major L. Like,
XXL.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly why we gotta turn<n>things
around! We gotta smile and<n>fake it till we make it!
Reach for the<n>stars and stuff, amirite? ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We can't call ourselves the Runaway<n>Besties if
we drop from the front just<n>'cause our vibes are
off!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Sides, if we snap a pic now, we can<n>post a
before-and-after later to show<n>what we look like
when we win!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
We can't wait to see your victory<n>selfie! You can
do it, Runaway<n>Besties!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, squad! It's gonna be so fire!<n>Okay, let me
hear you screeeam!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Who's gonna win the next race?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: The Runaway Besties!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Who's gonna steal the spotlight at<n>the concert?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: The Runaway Bestiiiies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hahaha! Now that's what I<n>call cheering.
Really got my vibes in<n>order.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! No time to mope! We're<n>going full steam
ahead! Thanks for<n>your support, fam!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Man, Helios, you're so awesome!<n>I'm more of a
Palmer fan myself, but<n>you've got me smiling too!

text_block_list.name: Helios's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Helios's smile is literally so<n>infectious! I
can't even look at her<n>without grinning myself!
She's the<n>best!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, no cap?! Everyone's<n>seriously smiling up
a storm here! All<n>right, get in, guys, we need a
selfie<n>with the squad!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, I come across<n>Daitaku Helios
and Mejiro Palmer,<n>fresh from hyping up the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa... So my smile makes them<n>happy, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, you mean what our fans said<n>before?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yep! So I was thinking, but...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It'd be high-key awesome if wecould cheer even more people up withour smiles! Like, what if we turned upthe vibes for the whole country, y'know? ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We could call it... Operation: Get<n>Japan Hyped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That sounds like a plan for sure!<n>But, uh,
how's it gonna work?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, good question. I guess I just<n>gotta find a
way to get the whole<n>country in a party mood... or
something.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! You're a trainer, right? Got<n>some advice
or somethin'?
choice_data_list: How about getting more attention on you?
Just keep doing what you've been doing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh. Em. Gee! That's so<n>galaxy-brained!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If we're talking about getting people<n>to take
notice, there's only one way<n>to do it! And that's to
go viral and ride<n>that wave of attention!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Sheesh, now I'm super hyped!What should I do? Hey, Trainer, youcan be my producer, okay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this whole idea was, like, your<n>brainchild, so
you get the honors.<n>Anyway, let's do this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sucked in by her whirlwind of<n>enthusiasm, I end
up becoming her<n>producer for Operation: Get
Japan<n>Hyped. I have no idea how this is<n>going to
work out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sooo... what are you gonna do?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No clue. But I've got my partner and<n>my producer
here, so let's go, go, go!<n>It's time to take the
world by storm!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how I got appointed as<n>her
producer, but first things first—I<n>have to catch up
with Daitaku Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What?! I shouldn't do anythingdifferent? I know you're my producerand all, but this ain't it, chief!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I calm her down by explaining that her<n>smile's so
genuine that just by<n>racing like normal, she'll
make the<n>spectators happy.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... Okay, it def hits different when<n>you say it
that way!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll keep serving up smiles<n>on the track,
then! ☆ Shout-out for the<n>tip, Trainer!
